attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
WIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
WIRM.NEW_END_CUSTOMER_KEY      as  END_CUSTOMER_KEY , 
WIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
WIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
WIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
WIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
WIRM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
WIRM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    ,
WIRM.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
WIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       ,
WIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
WIRM.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    ,
WIRM.DD_GL_DATETIME                ,
WIRM.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
WIRM.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            ,
WIRM.DV_FISCAL_DT                  ,
WIRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
WIRM.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          ,
WIRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD ,
WIRM.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            ,
WIRM.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       ,
WIRM.AR_TRX_DATETIME               ,
WIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
WIRM.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         ,
WIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
WIRM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
WIRM.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
WIRM.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
WIRM.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
WIRM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
WIRM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
WIRM.DV_REVENUE_FLG                ,
WIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
WIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
WIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
WIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
WIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
WIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
WIRM.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
WIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
WIRM.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
WIRM.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           ,
WIRM.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         ,
WIRM.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
WIRM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER        ,       
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
WIRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         ,
WIRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    ,
WIRM.GL_DT         
,WIRM.BK_SS_CD
,WIRM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
,WIRM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,WIRM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,WIRM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
,WIRM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
,WIRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
,WIRM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY
,WIRM.TRANSACTION_DT
,NULL GL_POSTED_DTM 
,WIRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,WIRM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY  
,WIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
,WIRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,WIRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* Replaced COALESCE(WIRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,'STANDALONE') - Q1FY15- OA*/
,COALESCE(WIRM.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(WIRM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,'UNKNOWN') /*PRBOBBA: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
,WIRM.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
,WIRM.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,            /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
WIRM.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
,WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /* PPUSA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /* PPUSA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
WIRM.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME, /* PNEELRAJ : Added as part of ICPM Q2FY16 */
WIRM.XCAT_FLG, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
WIRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
WIRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
WIRM.ELA_FLG, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
WIRM.POB_TYPE_CD,
'I' ACTION_CODE
,'I'  DML_TYPE
,'UNKNOWN' AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /*Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM FEB REL */ 
,RFD.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_END_CUST_RETRO_POS WIRM
/*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
ON RFD.CALENDAR_DATE= CASE WHEN WIRM.TRANSACTION_DT < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE ELSE 
WIRM.TRANSACTION_DT END 
/*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_GL_REV_MEASURE WGL
WHERE  WGL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = WIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AND
WGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AND
WGL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = WIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)

SELECT       GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY, GL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  GL.PRODUCT_KEY, GL.AR_TRX_KEY, GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, GL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
  GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY, GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, GL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
  GL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, GL.SALES_REP_NUMBER, GL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT, GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
  GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
  GL.DD_GL_DATETIME, GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD, GL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  GL.DV_FISCAL_DT, GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD, GL.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
  GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD, GL.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD, GL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
  GL.AR_TRX_DATETIME, GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, GL.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
  GL.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG, GL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG, GL.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
  GL.DV_MISC_FLG, GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG, GL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
  GL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG, GL.DV_REVENUE_FLG, GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
  GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT, GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
  GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT, GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT, GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
  GL.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT, GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT, GL.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
  GL.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY, GL.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY, GL.EDW_CREATE_USER,
  GL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, GL.EDW_UPDATE_USER, GL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
CAST(GL.DD_GL_DATETIME as DATE) GL_DT,
NULL BK_SS_CD ,                        
0 DV_EXTENDED_QTY    ,              
0 GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  ,      
0 GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,    
NULL OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD   ,         
NULL ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD      ,           
NULL TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,  
NULL WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  ,     
CASE WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD='POS' THEN NPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE 
ELSE GL.DV_FISCAL_DT 
END TRANSACTION_DT,
NULL GL_POSTED_DTM ,
RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 AS RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
-999 AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY  ,
/*Modified to derive OA columns from WK_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE_POS - Q1FY15 OA*/
GL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
GL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
COALESCE (CASE WHEN (GL.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL) THEN GL.BK_DEAL_ID /*FY20Q2 ICPM NOV REL*/
 WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','WEBEX'
/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ 
/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND ARTL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL'))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
)
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
THEN SO.BK_DEAL_ID 
ELSE NSO.BK_DEAL_ID 
END ,GL.BK_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,/*PRBOBBA: Modified AS PART OF Q1FY15*/ /* Q3fy16 XAAS Changes */
COALESCE ( CASE WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','WEBEX'
/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/
)  
OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND ARTL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL'))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
)
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
THEN SO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
ELSE NSO. BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE 
END ,'UNKNOWN') BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, /*PRBOBBA: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/ /* Q3fy16 XAAS Changes */
/* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
0 DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
0 DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
/*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
GL.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
GL.DSV_FLG,
/*ADDED LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */
GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /* PPUSA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,  /* PPUSA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */ 
'N' AS XCAT_FLG, /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */
'Others' AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 'N' AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,  /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 'N' AS ELA_FLG  /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */
,GL.POB_TYPE_CD
,'UNKNOWN' AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /*Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM FEB REL */
,RFD.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/ 
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WK_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE_POS GL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
 ON ( NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     =GL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  )
/* prbobba : Added for SAAS Q3FY14 */
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
 ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE ARTL
 ON GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=ARTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
ON RFD.CALENDAR_DATE=CASE WHEN NPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE ELSE NPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE END 
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX ART
 ON ART.AR_TRX_KEY=ARTL.AR_TRX_KEY
  /*Q3fy16 XAAS Changes start Block1 */
 /*
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$XAASVWDB.N_XAAS_SALES_ORDER   XNSO
  ON ARTL.RU_BK_XAAS_SALES_ORDER_ID_INT=XNSO.BK_SALES_ORDER_ID_INT
  AND XNSO.BK_SS_CD='SAAS_BRM'
 */
 
  /*Modified as part of Q2FY18 SOT change*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL
ON ARTL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY  = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  SO
ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  

 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$EXAASVWDB.N_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_LINE  SOL
ON ARTL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY = SOL.EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$EXAASVWDB.N_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO  SO
ON SOL.EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SO_KEY= SO.EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SO_KEY   */  
 /*Q3fy16 XAAS Changes End Block1 */

INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE  ABT
 ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=ART.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY

SELECT
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,GL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,GL.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,GL.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,GL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,CASE WHEN GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY<0 THEN -999 ELSE GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,GL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
,GL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,GL.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,GL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
,GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,GL.DD_GL_DATETIME                
,GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,GL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
,GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,GL.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
,GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
,GL.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
,GL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
,GL.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
,GL.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,GL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
,GL.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
,GL.DV_MISC_FLG                   
,GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
,GL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
,GL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
,GL.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
,GL.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
,GL.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,GL.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
,GL.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
,GL.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,GL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME          
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME               
,GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    
,GL.GL_DT                         
,GL.BK_SS_CD                      
,GL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
,GL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
,GL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,GL.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,GL.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
,GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
,GL.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
,GL.TRANSACTION_DT                
,GL.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
,GL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT    
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT      
,GL.SPLIT_PCT                     
,GL.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,GL.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,GL.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       
,GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,GL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,GL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,GL.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,GL.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           
,GL.DV_FMV_FLG                    
,GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,GL.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        
,GL.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   
,GL.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT     
,GL.DSV_FLG                       
,GL.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,GL.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_2TIER_CMDM_AMT   
,CMN.NEW_XCAT_FLG AS XCAT_FLG                 
,CMN.NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME       
,CMN.NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG      
,CMN.NEW_ELA_FLG AS ELA_FLG
,GL.POB_TYPE_CD
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
, GL.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,GL.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE GL,
$$STGDB.WI_GL_RORTRO_XCAT_MAP_FLG_POS CMN
WHERE
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  = CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_GL_REV_MEASURE WGL
WHERE  WGL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
AND WGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
AND WGL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ORDER BY GL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC )=1
